## Privacy and security impact

- [ ] Does not log prompts, responses, selected text, screenshots, voice input, or API keys.
- [ ] Stores secrets only in Keychain.
- [ ] Documents any new permissions or network behavior.

## Testing

- [ ] Swift typecheck command from `README.md`
- [ ] `plutil -lint Hover/Info.plist Hover.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj`
- [ ] Manual app test, if UI behavior changed
